name: Study Materials
description: Access lecture notes, presentations, and study guides.
fullDescription: Access a collection of lecture notes, presentations, study guides, and practice exams shared by students and professors.

name: Tutoring Services
description: Peer tutors and academic support services for all subjects.
fullDescription: Connect with tutors and academic support services across all subjects. Book one-on-one or group sessions.

name: Academic Calendar
description: Important dates, exams, and registration deadlines.
fullDescription: Stay informed about major academic dates, breaks, deadlines, and exam schedules.

name: Research Papers

name: Career Center
description: Resume help, career counseling, and job search support.
